message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #808080
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #808080
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EDEDED
  ActorBorderColor #808080
  ActorBackgroundColor #EDEDED
}

actor Actor as A
participant LoginController as LC
participant Md5Util as MD5
participant ISysUserService as SVC
participant PasswordUtil as PWD
participant JwtUtil as JWT
participant LoginUser as LU

A -> LC : login
activate LC

LC -> MD5 : md5Encode
activate MD5

MD5 -> MD5 : byteArrayToHexString
activate MD5
deactivate MD5

MD5 -> MD5 : byteToHexString
activate MD5
deactivate MD5

MD5 --> MD5
MD5 --> MD5

MD5 -> MD5 : byteArrayToHexString
activate MD5
deactivate MD5

MD5 -> MD5 : byteToHexString
activate MD5
deactivate MD5

MD5 --> MD5
MD5 --> MD5

MD5 --> LC
deactivate MD5

LC -> SVC : checkUserIsEffective
activate SVC
SVC --> LC
deactivate SVC

LC -> PWD : encrypt
activate PWD

PWD -> PWD : getPbeKey
activate PWD
deactivate PWD

PWD --> PWD

PWD -> PWD : bytesToHexString
activate PWD
deactivate PWD

PWD --> PWD

PWD --> LC
deactivate PWD

LC -> LC : userInfo

LC -> JWT : sign
activate JWT
JWT --> LC
deactivate JWT

LC -> SVC : updateUserDepart
activate SVC
SVC --> LC
deactivate SVC

LC -> SVC : updateUserDepart
activate SVC
SVC --> LC
deactivate SVC

LC --> LC

LC -> LU : new
activate LU
LU --> LC
deactivate LU

LC --> A
deactivate LC
@enduml
